title: Exploring the Potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) for Low-resource Languages: A Study on Named-Entity Recognition (NER) and Part-Of-Speech (POS) Tagging for Nepali Language
research_areas: T11 Information Extraction, Named Entity Recognition, Relationship Extraction and Event Detection
T21 Parsing, Tagging, Chunking, Grammar, Syntax, Morphosyntax, Morphology
T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
